name: @estebanforge/pi-php-review
description_en: PHP code-review tool for Pi. Grades your git diffs against a focused PHP 8.2+ rubric (4 sections, 16 entries: strict-types/typing, error handling, builtin correctness, security). Each entry has a bad/good pair; the LLM proposes a corrected snippet. Return
description_zh: 面向 Pi 的 PHP 代码审查工具。根据专注的 PHP 8.2+ 标准（4 个部分，16 个条目：strict-types/typing、错误处理、内置正确性、安全）对您的 git diff 进行评分。每个条目都有坏/好对；LLM 提出修正代码段。返回
